checkpoint: Landmark Phase: Phase 1 Complete. Crème de la Crème Architecture & SS Media Strategy Locked

architectural_state.lighting_model: Radial-gradient bloom (Piña Ecru fabric over Champagne Heirloom skin) with 4% high-frequency SVG grain.
architectural_state.framing_physics: The Strict 16px CSS Barong L-Frame. Solid Champagne on top and left edges with complex inset box-shadows. Reacts to scroll (flattens with backdrop blur when moving, deeply embossed when settled).
architectural_state.calado_grid: Tone-on-tone Piña Ecru 1px borders with 12x12px star tacks, elevated via delicate drop-shadows to simulate raised silk threads.
architectural_state.typography: Strict discipline: Fraunces (Display), EB Garamond (Narrative), Inter (UI Utility). Wordmark uses EB Garamond Italic Capital 'K' grafted to Fraunces 'atha'.
architectural_state.wordmark_monolith: Pure Volcanic Obsidian (#111112) wordmark, avoiding splitting colors to preserve monumental, institutional authority.
architectural_state.cta_interaction: Embroidered Tag CTA: delicate border (rgba(138,62,49,0.3)) simulating a linen label. Tactile typewriter key hover (translateY(2px)) and deep active validation click (translateY(3px)) with oxidized Loko Rust (#8A3E31) shift. Master CTA text: 'Commission KTHA'.
architectural_state.photographic_optics: Archival Matte: Strict, asymmetrical Piña Ecru borders with a microscopic 1px Obsidian hairline border. Existing SS Demo assets will be PRESERVED in their exact structural positions and modified via CSS injections.

palette_mandate.rule: Absolute adherence to the 11 canonical tokens. All colors must be derived from lighting/shadow interactions between these tokens. No pure #fff, no pure #000, no #F9F6F0 (Alabaster). No legacy OAX tokens.

ss_media_strategy.details: We will KEEP all existing Squarespace assets (including imgg-demo-* placeholders on Gallery, Founders, Installations) in their current structural positions. We will NOT remove or rebuild them. We will target them with CSS injections (Archival Matte, Binakul Shift, custom filtering).

strict_boundaries: Markdown manifestos must remain in the root directory to preserve the CC orchestration chain.
Do not touch Front End Gallery without permission.
Do not touch Admin Panel without permission.
Do not touch Subdomain architecture without permission.

agent_directives.target: CC_ITERATION/LIGHT_ITERATION/KATHA_STYLE_PROPOSAL.html is the Absolute True Taheng Grepo Baseline.
agent_directives.rule: Phase 1 is complete (KATHA_BRAND_PROPOSAL.html is locked). Next up: Phase 2 (Brand Book V2) and Phase 3 (Squarespace katha-injection.css).
